text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wait, the people being interviewed in<n>this
article... It's those two men from<n>before. That
means... they came to<n>watch our race!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
"They ran the Nakayama turf<n>2,500-meter, which
has sharp turns and<n>includes six corners to make
things even<n>trickier. Aptitude is everything on a<n>
course like that."

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
"Where's this coming from?" Wow, they<n>haven't
changed. I miss the days when<n>we'd cheer side by
side, crying together,<n>celebrating together...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's our duty to deliver moments like<n>those to
fans. I'm going to share this with<n>Kita later. ♪
